mapper.sql: id, modelNo, quantity, lastInDate, lasOutDate, remark, createTime, createUser, updateTime, updateUser, status, eprice, lotPrice, warehouseCode, supplier, designTypeId, productName, leftQty
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.SlowMovingModel
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.SlowMovingModel (id, modelNo, quantity, lastInDate, lasOutDate, remark, createTime, createUser, updateTime, updateUser, status, eprice, lotPrice, warehouseCode, supplier, designTypeId, productName, leftQty ) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{lastindate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{lasoutdate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lotprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{warehousecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{designtypeid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{productname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leftqty,jdbcType=INTEGER} )

modelNo,
quantity,

createTime,
createUser,

status,
eprice,

warehouseCode,

productName,

mapper.update:
update dbo.SlowMovingModel
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
lastInDate = #{record.lastindate,jdbcType=DATE},
lasOutDate = #{record.lasoutdate,jdbcType=DATE},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{record.createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
createUser = #{record.createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateUser = #{record.updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
eprice = #{record.eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
lotPrice = #{record.lotprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
warehouseCode = #{record.warehousecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier = #{record.supplier,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
designTypeId = #{record.designtypeid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
productName = #{record.productname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
leftQty = #{record.leftqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update dbo.SlowMovingModel set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, lastInDate = #{record.lastindate,jdbcType=DATE}, lasOutDate = #{record.lasoutdate,jdbcType=DATE}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{record.createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, createUser = #{record.createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateUser = #{record.updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, eprice = #{record.eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, lotPrice = #{record.lotprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, warehouseCode = #{record.warehousecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, supplier = #{record.supplier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, designTypeId = #{record.designtypeid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, productName = #{record.productname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, leftQty = #{record.leftqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update dbo.SlowMovingModel
modelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
lastInDate = #{lastindate,jdbcType=DATE},
lasOutDate = #{lasoutdate,jdbcType=DATE},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
createUser = #{createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

updateUser = #{updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},

lotPrice = #{lotprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
warehouseCode = #{warehousecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier = #{supplier,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
designTypeId = #{designtypeid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
productName = #{productname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
leftQty = #{leftqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
